# RecipeCard

## Summary
The `RecipeCard` is a Boxel card definition that represents a recipe. It includes fields for the recipe name, description, prep time, cook time, servings, difficulty, cuisine, ingredients, instructions, tips, and tags. The card has several formats (isolated, embedded, and fitted) that display the recipe information in different ways.

## Import
```gts
import { RecipeCard } from '../recipe-card-a2c7af02-92a6-4301-8395-52c47a897b74/recipe-card';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the `RecipeCard` as a field within a consuming card or field, you can define it as follows:

```gts
@field recipe = linksTo(RecipeCard);
```

This will allow you to link a `RecipeCard` instance to the consuming card or field.

## Template Usage
To display a `RecipeCard` instance in a template, you can use the following syntax:

```hbs
<@fields.recipe @format="isolated" />
```

This will render the `RecipeCard` in the isolated format. You can also use the `embedded` or `fitted` formats depending on your needs.
